FROM (
    SELECT [a].[Id], [a].[ConcurrencyStamp], [a].[CreationTime], [a].[CreatorUserId], [a].[DeleterUserId], [a].[DeletionTime], [a].[Description], [a].[DisplayName], [a].[IsDefault], [a].[IsDeleted], [a].[IsStatic], [a].[LastModificationTime], [a].[LastModifierUserId], [a].[Name], [a].[NormalizedName], [a].[TenantId]

    WHERE (@__ef_filter__p_0 = CAST(1 AS bit) OR [a].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)) AND (@__ef_filter__p_1 = CAST(1 AS bit) OR [a].[TenantId] = @__ef_filter__CurrentTenantId_2)
    ORDER BY [a].[DisplayName]
    OFFSET @__p_0 ROWS FETCH NEXT @__p_1 ROWS ONLY
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [a0].[Id], [a0].[CreationTime], [a0].[CreatorUserId], [a0].[Discriminator], [a0].[IsGranted], [a0].[Name], [a0].[TenantId], [a0].[RoleId]

) AS [t0] ON [t].[Id] = [t0].[RoleId]

    OFFSET @__p_0 ROWS FETCH NEXT @__p_1 ROWS ONLY
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [a0].[Id], [a0].[CreationTime], [a0].[CreatorUserId], [a0].[DeleterUserId], [a0].[DeletionTime], [a0].[Description], [a0].[IsDeleted], [a0].[LastModificationTime], [a0].[LastModifierUserId], [a0].[Name], [a0].[ParentId]
    FROM [AppCategories] AS [a0]
    WHERE @__ef_filter__p_0 = CAST(1 AS bit) OR [a0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t0] ON [t].[CategoryId] = [t0].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [a1].[Id], [a1].[Address], [a1].[Code], [a1].[CreationTime], [a1].[CreatorUserId], [a1].[DeleterUserId], [a1].[DeletionTime], [a1].[Email], [a1].[IsActive], [a1].[IsDeleted], [a1].[LastModificationTime], [a1].[LastModifierUserId], [a1].[Name], [a1].[PhoneNumber], [a1].[TaxCode]
    FROM [AppSuppliers] AS [a1]
    WHERE @__ef_filter__p_0 = CAST(1 AS bit) OR [a1].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t1] ON [t].[SupplierId] = [t1].[Id]
ORDER BY [t].[CreationTime] DESC

SELECT [t].[Id], [t].[Barcode], [t].[CategoryId], [t].[Code], [t].[CreationTime], [t].[CreatorUserId], [t].[DeleterUserId], [t].[DeletionTime], [t].[Description], [t].[Image], [t].[IsActive], [t].[IsDeleted], [t].[LastModificationTime], [t].[LastModifierUserId], [t].[Name], [t].[SupplierId], [t].[Unit], [t].[Volume], [t].[Weight], [t0].[Id], [t0].[CreationTime], [t0].[CreatorUserId], [t0].[DeleterUserId], [t0].[DeletionTime], [t0].[Description], [t0].[IsDeleted], [t0].[LastModificationTime], [t0].[LastModifierUserId], [t0].[Name], [t0].[ParentId], [t1].[Id], [t1].[Address], [t1].[Code], [t1].[CreationTime], [t1].[CreatorUserId], [t1].[DeleterUserId], [t1].[DeletionTime], [t1].[Email], [t1].[IsActive], [t1].[IsDeleted], [t1].[LastModificationTime], [t1].[LastModifierUserId], [t1].[Name], [t1].[PhoneNumber], [t1].[TaxCode]
FROM (
    SELECT [a].[Id], [a].[Barcode], [a].[CategoryId], [a].[Code], [a].[CreationTime], [a].[CreatorUserId], [a].[DeleterUserId], [a].[DeletionTime], [a].[Description], [a].[Image], [a].[IsActive], [a].[IsDeleted], [a].[LastModificationTime], [a].[LastModifierUserId], [a].[Name], [a].[SupplierId], [a].[Unit], [a].[Volume], [a].[Weight]

    WHERE @__ef_filter__p_0 = CAST(1 AS bit) OR [a].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)

    OFFSET @__p_0 ROWS FETCH NEXT @__p_1 ROWS ONLY
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [a0].[Id], [a0].[CreationTime], [a0].[CreatorUserId], [a0].[DeleterUserId], [a0].[DeletionTime], [a0].[Description], [a0].[IsDeleted], [a0].[LastModificationTime], [a0].[LastModifierUserId], [a0].[Name], [a0].[ParentId]
    FROM [AppCategories] AS [a0]
    WHERE @__ef_filter__p_0 = CAST(1 AS bit) OR [a0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t0] ON [t].[CategoryId] = [t0].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [a1].[Id], [a1].[Address], [a1].[Code], [a1].[CreationTime], [a1].[CreatorUserId], [a1].[DeleterUserId], [a1].[DeletionTime], [a1].[Email], [a1].[IsActive], [a1].[IsDeleted], [a1].[LastModificationTime], [a1].[LastModifierUserId], [a1].[Name], [a1].[PhoneNumber], [a1].[TaxCode]
    FROM [AppSuppliers] AS [a1]
    WHERE @__ef_filter__p_0 = CAST(1 AS bit) OR [a1].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t1] ON [t].[SupplierId] = [t1].[Id]
ORDER BY [t].[CreationTime] DESC

    WHERE @__ef_filter__p_0 = CAST(1 AS bit) OR [a].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ORDER BY [a].[CreationTime] DESC
    OFFSET @__p_0 ROWS FETCH NEXT @__p_1 ROWS ONLY
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [a0].[Id], [a0].[CreationTime], [a0].[CreatorUserId], [a0].[DeleterUserId], [a0].[DeletionTime], [a0].[Description], [a0].[IsDeleted], [a0].[LastModificationTime], [a0].[LastModifierUserId], [a0].[Name], [a0].[ParentId]
    FROM [AppCategories] AS [a0]
    WHERE @__ef_filter__p_0 = CAST(1 AS bit) OR [a0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t0] ON [t].[CategoryId] = [t0].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [a1].[Id], [a1].[Address], [a1].[Code], [a1].[CreationTime], [a1].[CreatorUserId], [a1].[DeleterUserId], [a1].[DeletionTime], [a1].[Email], [a1].[IsActive], [a1].[IsDeleted], [a1].[LastModificationTime], [a1].[LastModifierUserId], [a1].[Name], [a1].[PhoneNumber], [a1].[TaxCode]
    FROM [AppSuppliers] AS [a1]
    WHERE @__ef_filter__p_0 = CAST(1 AS bit) OR [a1].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
